description: Curated YouTube video resources for CSS backdrop-filter

videos.title: Create this trendy blurry glass effect with CSS
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Step-by-step tutorial on creating glassy effects with backdrop-filter including gradient borders, radial gradients, and proper stacking contexts.

videos.title: Create a Frosted Glass Effect with a Gradient Border
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Recreates a frosted glass effect using backdrop-filter and linear-gradient borders with techniques from Josh Comeau's glass effect article.

videos.title: Create a glass effect in CSS (Glassmorphism)
videos.creator: Coding2GO
videos.description: Quick glassmorphism tutorial using backdrop-filter blur, transparent backgrounds, and subtle border highlights for the glass look.

videos.title: 23 CSS features you should know (and be using) by now
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Covers modern CSS features including backdrop-filter, accent-color, and other visual enhancement properties.
